title: Lab protocol
description: Shape of a protocols/*.yaml file. Strict by design (unknown fields are errors) — extend this schema deliberately as the project's step vocabulary grows.

protocol.description: Stable protocol name; must equal the filename without extension.

parameters.description: Per-run inputs filled in by the orchestrator at run start. Run-specific values live here as parameters, never hardcoded in steps.

step_id.description: Permanent anchor for notes/measurements once the protocol has executed. Never rename or reuse.

action.description: Verb from the workflow engine's action vocabulary.

params.description: Nominal parameters for the action. Reference run parameters as "{parameter_name}".
